context.projectOverview: agent-bober medical-sop pipeline. Sprint 3 makes the synthesis/critic model+provider configurable via config.medical.inference, gates cloud usage behind the existing cloud-inference egress axis (default false; fail-closed to local), and records the critic outcome as an IDs/enums-only criticVerdict in the audit log.

completedSprints.title: Grounding-critic module (fail-closed core)
completedSprints.summary: grounding-critic.ts: getGroundingVerdict (fail-closed reject on parse exhaustion). Commit 10bb964.

completedSprints.title: Gated synthesis + engine wiring
completedSprints.summary: synthesizeGrounded in literature.ts (synthesize->critic->one re-synth->abstain, try/catch->abstain on throw, GROUNDED_GATE_MAX_LLM_CALLS=6); engine.ts:403 swapped synthesize->synthesizeGrounded. The engine still constructs the local llmClient at ~engine.ts:402 and appends event:'answer'|'abstain' at ~:417 (NO criticVerdict yet). Commit 90c3ca3.
